parameters.query:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (indicator) indicator, value, previous_value, change_pct, timestamp
  FROM macro_indicators
  WHERE timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '3 days'
  ORDER BY indicator, timestamp DESC
),
prev_regime AS (
  SELECT macro_regime, risk_sentiment, fed_phase
  FROM regime_state
  ORDER BY timestamp DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
  json_agg(json_build_object('indicator', l.indicator, 'value', l.value, 'prev', l.previous_value, 'chg', l.change_pct)) as indicators,
  (SELECT row_to_json(p) FROM prev_regime p) as prev_regime
FROM latest l;

INSERT INTO regime_state (macro_regime, risk_sentiment, fed_phase, yield_curve_spread, vix_level, dxy_trend, confidence, reasoning, timestamp) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9) RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO events (type, source, instrument, payload)
VALUES ('macro', 'wf10-regime', NULL,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'regime_new', '{{ $json.macro_regime }}',
    'regime_prev', '{{ $json.prev_regime }}',
    'risk_sentiment_new', '{{ $json.risk_sentiment }}',
    'risk_sentiment_prev', '{{ $json.prev_sentiment }}',
    'fed_phase', '{{ $json.fed_phase }}',
    'vix', {{ $json.vix_level === null ? 'null' : $json.vix_level }},
    'yield_curve_spread', {{ $json.yield_curve_spread === null ? 'null' : $json.yield_curve_spread }},
    'dxy_trend', '{{ $json.dxy_trend }}',
    'confidence', {{ $json.confidence }},
    'reasoning', {{ JSON.stringify($json.reasoning) }}
  )
) RETURNING id;
